name: Event Duplication
shortDescription: Clone an existing event to a new date and time. All fields carry over — channel, roles, reminders, description, color. Creator sets the new start and end time.

name: Close Signups Early
shortDescription: Set a time-based RSVP cutoff before the event starts. After the cutoff, RSVP buttons are disabled and late signups are rejected with an ephemeral message.

name: Multiple Reminders Per Event
shortDescription: Set up to 3 reminder offsets per event on free, or up to 5 on premium. Each fires independently at the configured time before the event starts.

name: Event Threads
shortDescription: Automatically create a thread on the event message when an event is posted. Free servers get a public thread. Premium servers get a private thread with RSVPs auto-added.

name: Event Templates
shortDescription: Save a set of event defaults as a named template and use it with /newevent to pre-fill channel, roles, reminder offsets, embed color, and description boilerplate.

name: Custom Reminder Messages
shortDescription: Write your own reminder message text instead of the default Soren embed. Your custom message is sent in place of the generic countdown when the reminder fires.

name: Attendee Role Auto-Assign
shortDescription: Automatically assign a Discord role when a member RSVPs yes. The role is removed when they un-RSVP or switch to no or tentative.

name: Waitlist System
shortDescription: When max RSVP is hit, overflow signups go to a waitlist. When an accepted attendee drops out, the next person on the waitlist is automatically promoted and notified.

name: RSVP Insights
shortDescription: After an event ends, Soren posts an attendance report showing who showed up, who bailed, and the overall attendance rate. Tracks via voice channel presence or a check-in button fallback.
